# Sof Zman Biur Chametz

[Back to all zmanim](index.md)

## Sof Zman Biur Chametz Baal Hatanya

The latest time for burning chametz on Erev Pesach according to the Baal Hatanya.

Calculated as 5 Baal Hatanya seasonal hours after netz amiti, sunrise, with the day measured from sunrise to sunset.

This zman is only for Erev Pesach; on other days it may not be available.

It may not be available if the calculation cannot be made, such as in the Arctic Circle where there is at least one day a year when the sun does not rise and one when it does not set.

??? info "Technical details"
    Source method: `ComprehensiveZmanimCalendar.getSofZmanBiurChametzBaalHatanya`

    Technical reference: `com.kosherjava.zmanim.ComprehensiveZmanimCalendar.getSofZmanBiurChametzBaalHatanya`

## Sof Zman Biur Chametz GRA

The latest time for burning chametz on Erev Pesach according to the opinion of the [GRA](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vilna_Gaon).

Calculated as 5 GRA seasonal hours after sea-level sunrise, with the day measured from sunrise to sunset.

This zman is only for Erev Pesach; on other days it may not be available.

It may not be available if the calculation cannot be made, such as in the Arctic Circle where there is at least one day a year when the sun does not rise and one when it does not set.

??? info "Technical details"
    Source method: `ComprehensiveZmanimCalendar.getSofZmanBiurChametzGRA`

    Technical reference: `com.kosherjava.zmanim.ComprehensiveZmanimCalendar.getSofZmanBiurChametzGRA`

## Sof Zman Biur Chametz MGA 16 Point 1 Degrees

The latest time for burning chametz on Erev Pesach according to the opinion of the [Magen Avraham (MGA)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Avraham_Gombiner), using dawn when the sun is 16.1° below the horizon.

Calculated as 5 seasonal hours after dawn, with the MGA day measured from dawn to nightfall, both defined as the sun being 16.1° below sunrise or sunset.

This zman is only for Erev Pesach; on other days it may not be available.

It may not be available if the calculation cannot be made, such as in northern and southern locations even south of the Arctic Circle and north of the Antarctic Circle where the sun may not reach low enough below the horizon for this calculation.

??? info "Technical details"
    Source method: `ComprehensiveZmanimCalendar.getSofZmanBiurChametzMGA16Point1Degrees`

    Technical reference: `com.kosherjava.zmanim.ComprehensiveZmanimCalendar.getSofZmanBiurChametzMGA16Point1Degrees`

## Sof Zman Biur Chametz MGA 72 Minutes

The latest time for burning chametz on Erev Pesach according to the opinion of the [Magen Avraham (MGA)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Avraham_Gombiner), using dawn 72 minutes before sunrise.

Calculated as 5 seasonal hours after dawn, with the MGA day measured from dawn 72 minutes before sunrise to nightfall 72 minutes after sunset.

This zman is only for Erev Pesach; on other days it may not be available.

It may not be available if the calculation cannot be made, such as in the Arctic Circle where there is at least one day a year when the sun does not rise and one when it does not set.

??? info "Technical details"
    Source method: `ComprehensiveZmanimCalendar.getSofZmanBiurChametzMGA72Minutes`

    Technical reference: `com.kosherjava.zmanim.ComprehensiveZmanimCalendar.getSofZmanBiurChametzMGA72Minutes`

## Sof Zman Biur Chametz MGA 72 Minutes Zmanis

The latest time for burning chametz on Erev Pesach according to the opinion of the [Magen Avraham (MGA)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Avraham_Gombiner), using dawn 72 zmanis minutes before sunrise.

Calculated as 5 seasonal hours after dawn, with the MGA day measured from dawn 72 zmanis minutes before sunrise to nightfall 72 zmanis minutes after sunset.

This zman is only for Erev Pesach; on other days it may not be available.

It may not be available if the calculation cannot be made, such as in the Arctic Circle where there is at least one day a year when the sun does not rise and one when it does not set.

??? info "Technical details"
    Source method: `ComprehensiveZmanimCalendar.getSofZmanBiurChametzMGA72MinutesZmanis`

    Technical reference: `com.kosherjava.zmanim.ComprehensiveZmanimCalendar.getSofZmanBiurChametzMGA72MinutesZmanis`
